greetings.0: Salama! Ahoana no ahafahako manampy anao anio?
greetings.1: Salama! Tongasoa! Inona no azoko atao ho anao?
greetings.2: Salama e! Tena faly miresaka aminao!
greetings.3: Salama! Eto aho hanampy. Inona no ilainao?
greetings.4: Salama! Manao ahoana ianao? Ahoana no hahasoa ahy?
